name: Raspberry Bars
recipeInstructions:
or preserves or conserve
Bar cookies are easy to prepare because they are spread in a pan and baked all at one time. They should be cooled before cutting.
This is such an easy recipe-but it tastes like you spent hours preparing it. It's great for brunch and coffee klatches!
Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, salt and oatmeal. Cut in all but two tablespoons butter until the mixture is crumbly. Press half of the flour mixture evenly into a greased 13 x 9-inch pan. Spread jam over the batter in the pan, then top with remaining flour mixture. Dot with two tablespoons butter and with chopped pecans.
Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes until set. Let cool completely before cutting into rectangles.
Variation: Use other types of jam, such as apricot.
Yield: 24
